case_title: NICHOLAS FONTI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOYCELYN PEREZ--CCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONTI, NICHOLAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
